name: Backburner
description: A Hyperion SMG built around a fixed incendiary Maliwan barrel, giving it stronger elemental application and better damage over time than most weapons of similar rarity. Like other Hyperion SMGs, it starts a little loose and becomes more accurate the longer you hold the trigger.
notes: It belongs to the fixed-element Hyperion SMG line, can spawn at green rarity or higher, and is most commonly obtained as a standard world drop.
